title: Recognise plants
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise plants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for plant recognition

pcs.text: Confirm work activity and instructions with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work activity and instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work activity and instructions with supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and prepare tools, equipment and material for plant recognition activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare tools, equipment and material for plant recognition activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare tools, equipment and material for plant recognition activity.

pcs.text: Locate a range of desirable and non-desirable plants requiring recognition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate a range of desirable and non-desirable plants requiring recognition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate a range of desirable and non-desirable plants requiring recognition.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for plant recognition

elements.title: Recognise specified plants

pcs.text: Conduct a visual inspection on plants to identify plant family features and classifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a visual inspection on plants to identify plant family features and classifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a visual inspection on plants to identify plant family features and classifications.

pcs.text: Record brief descriptions of plant habits, characteristics and significant features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record brief descriptions of plant habits, characteristics and significant features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record brief descriptions of plant habits, characteristics and significant features.

pcs.text: Use available resources to assist with plant recognition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use available resources to assist with plant recognition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use available resources to assist with plant recognition.

pcs.text: Seek advice to assist with plant recognition from appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice to assist with plant recognition from appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice to assist with plant recognition from appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Recognise and name specified plants using their identifiable characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and name specified plants using their identifiable characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and name specified plants using their identifiable characteristics.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Recognise specified plants

elements.title: Identify plants

pcs.text: Record plant information according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record plant information according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record plant information according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm plant identification with supervisor, and refer to plant by botanical name
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm plant identification with supervisor, and refer to plant by botanical name?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm plant identification with supervisor, and refer to plant by botanical name.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify plants

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
